name: FileNetBrowser
description: Folder and document browser widget for IBM FileNet Content Engine via GraphQL, used in IBM Business Automation Workflow

configOptions.name: graphqlEndpoint
configOptions.label: GraphQL Endpoint
configOptions.description: Full URL of the FileNet Content Engine GraphQL API endpoint

configOptions.name: rootFolderPath
configOptions.label: Root Folder Path
configOptions.description: FileNet folder path to start browsing from

configOptions.name: showDocumentDetails
configOptions.label: Show Document Details
configOptions.description: Show document version and metadata details in the list

configOptions.name: allowMultiSelect
configOptions.label: Allow Multi-Select
configOptions.description: Allow multiple items to be selected at once

configOptions.name: showBreadcrumb
configOptions.label: Show Breadcrumb
configOptions.description: Show breadcrumb navigation at the top

configOptions.name: pageSize
configOptions.label: Page Size
configOptions.description: Number of documents to display per page (0 = no limit)

configOptions.name: showPagination
configOptions.label: Show Pagination
configOptions.description: Show pagination controls when there are more documents than pageSize

configOptions.name: onFolderSelected
configOptions.label: On Folder Selected
configOptions.description: Event fired when a folder is selected

configOptions.name: onDocumentSelected
configOptions.label: On Document Selected
configOptions.description: Event fired when a document is selected

configOptions.name: onNavigate
configOptions.label: On Navigate
configOptions.description: Event fired when navigating to a different folder
